reviews.review_description: Great

reviews.review_title: Fun, but bugs on Oculus Go
reviews.review_description: I enjoy VR shooting games and this one is a lot of fun, especially the cardboard zombie hordes! My only gripe is on some levels targets cannot be shot because the scenery is in the way and you cannot move on Oculus Go.
I love target play. I never Tire of this game it's only getting better and better.
Real good  game love it.
This is everything that I wished SWAT Academy had, and in many ways it feels like an extension of that.  No complaints, this is a great refined app!  Keeps me coming back for more.
Awesome gun club 3
When in the range the weapon is mis alinged and I cannot get it to raise up to a position where I can look through the site.

Best shooting game so far, only problem is the aiming should make it more closer to the face or eye is to far out, hip firing is great, should also make a co-ops online zombies mode with real zombies that would be incredible, and should add more stuff or item when play online, like grenades, etc.��

reviews.review_title: Why did i wait this long
reviews.review_description: I always seemed to think it was just more a mini game shooting gallery had no clue about all the depth and the challenges just a legit must have

Pretty fun.  Zombies are basically a cardboard cut out.

Wish - a trap and skeet level.
Another possibility - Sporting Clays.

Then another wish - A Precision Pistol (see NRA National Gallery Course)
could not get this to load at all just keep getting update option very annoying
Love that you can set eye dominance - I'm a lefty

Like the game but find myself having to calibrate far too much. Also, some of the sights don't work. The variable x12 scope, for example, just has a black sight you can't see down- how annoying! Just patiently waiting for more DLC now.
Great shooter for Oculus go.  Fun arenas.
Ive tried to install it 7 times... my phone plan almost all gone... what the heck is wrong with what i did?
It's certainly not the best game I've ever had the opportunity to play, far too glitchy.

After playing this for a couple weeks and using it almost daily, the shooting is fantastic & graphics are great, the problem is the way you battle the zombies on the later boards, your back is against the wall, you have them coming from all sides and are given 2 grenade launchers & to initiate the grenades you have to stare down and click on it and then look up and pick your target & by this time you are dead and restarting, great game it’s just set up for your death
One of the most interactive and highly addictive first person shooter games on Oculus go.
A great game. Very realistic and challenging. The trigger on the GO is best for this game. You will enjoy this and feel like you are at the range.

(1) no laser sight on the oculus go version??? you gotta be FN kidding me

(2) 100-round magazine available for many weapons BUT NOT THE TOMMY GUN? this is deeply offensive to weapons enthusiasts and american history buffs alike, not to mention anyone who's ever seen miller's crossing

(3) i paid like a zillion dollars for the reaper p90, which did NOT come with the 100-round magazine, and guess what....no upgrades are available for this, since it's already supposed to be tricked out, so the end result is IT'S IMPOSSIBLE TO GET THE 100-ROUND MAGAZINE!!

graphics are great, though. and fyi you DON'T need the grenade launcher to beat the zombies...just save up for 100-round magazines and zombie-killer bullets. actually this could be a really great game, but points 1 and 2 and 3 that i mentioned earlier really got me bummin. cuz i'm a really sensitive fella and i scream bloody murder when i don't get my way gobble gobble

ADDED ON:
also annoying - after you complete levels, say for example you complete levels 1-20.... when you want to go back to do them all over again for fun, starting at 1, each time you complete a level you have to remember which one you just did, because the game automatically sets you at the highest level you completed EVER. you basically have to write this down to keep track, which is a pain in the butt with the headset on. VERY annoying
